hypothesis: First-run bootstrap: create quant_research/ structure, survey existing work, understand current best results
what_i_did: Created directory structure per CLAUDE.md Section 4. Surveyed 90 existing YLOka backtest runs (sessions 1-5). Best prior result: exp_05_donchian CAGR=48.73% Sharpe=1.00. Computed signal IC: pred_3m IC=0.022 (t=2.62), pred_6m IC=0.029 (t=4.01). Computed oracle bound: K=3 CAGR=1632% Sharpe=6.32.
next_action: Run H6 experiments targeting Sharpe improvement

hypothesis: Quality filter + invvol weighting + vol targeting can close Sharpe gap from 1.0 to 2.0
what_i_did: 59 experiments: quality vol ceilings (0.35-0.80), invvol weighting (w=0.15-0.50), K sweep (2-20) with quality, hold sweep (1-12) with quality, vol targeting overlay (8%-18% target), invvol portfolio weights.

result.key_finding: Quality filter cuts CAGR proportionally more than it improves Sharpe. Vol targeting does NOT improve Sharpe by construction. Max Sharpe 1.11 at CAGR 16%.

hypothesis: Risk-adjusted scoring and LightGBM can improve Sharpe
what_i_did: 37 experiments: risk-adjusted scoring (pred/vol K=3-10), Donchian+quality combos, LightGBM walk-forward ranker, LightGBM Sharpe-label.

result.lgbm_conclusion: Cannot beat pred_3m/pred_6m using same features. IC negative.

next_action: Fix LightGBM, test enhanced crash gate

hypothesis: LightGBM fixed labels + enhanced crash gate (breadth)
what_i_did: 20 experiments: LightGBM quintile labels (IC=-0.009), LightGBM Sharpe-label, enhanced crash gate (breadth<0.35), LightGBM+enhanced gate.

result.conclusion: Both worse than baseline. Breadth gate over-filters. LightGBM can't beat existing predictions. Session max Sharpe=1.12 at CAGR=13%. Sharpe 2.0+CAGR 50% structurally unreachable with current data.

next_action: Write STATE.md, escalate to V for goal clarification
